headline: Budget 2026 Unveiled: Historic Investment in Infrastructure
tldr: Govt allocates record $500B for infrastructure development
key_points: Increased spending on transportation and renewable energy
New tax incentives introduced for businesses
losers: Low-income households affected by higher taxes
market_impact: Boosts economic growth, but poses fiscal risks
why_it_matters: Investment in infrastructure to drive sustainable growth
for_you: Budget's impact on your wallet and finances
contrarian_view: Critics warn of debt burden and inflationary pressures

video_script.hook: Big budget boost for infrastructure development
